# link11waap_edge_functions (Data Source)

Lists all edge functions in a configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Edge Functions Data Source

data "link11waap_config" "main" {}

data "link11waap_edge_functions" "all" {
  config_id = data.link11waap_config.main.id
}

output "edge_functions" {
  value = data.link11waap_edge_functions.all.edge_functions
}

output "edge_function_names" {
  value = [for ef in data.link11waap_edge_functions.all.edge_functions : ef.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_id` (String) Configuration ID.

### Read-Only

- `edge_functions` (Attributes List) List of edge functions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--edge_functions))

<a id="nestedatt--edge_functions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `edge_functions`

Read-Only:

- `code` (String) Lua source code.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier.
- `name` (String) Name of the edge function.
- `phase` (String) Execution phase (request or response).
